painPoints.badge: 6 Problems Eating 80% of Marketing Team's Time
painPoints.title: Flowa Solves Each One — In 10 Minutes
painPoints.subtitle: From chaos to control, from burnout to breakthrough

multiChannel.problemSubtitle: Instagram Still Cuts Off Your Caption
realityChecks: Website needs 800 words with SEO structure
Facebook max 300 words, rich text format
consequences: Each topic takes 2-3 hours just to adapt format
70% of posts don't get engagement due to wrong format

realityChecks: TikTok/Reels need hook in first 3 seconds
60s video needs precise timing per section
consequences: Re-shoot 5-6 times because 'don't know what to say'
80% effort on filming/editing, only 20% on content strategy
solutionSteps: AI creates script with detailed timing

realityChecks: Each slide needs: Text + Visual concept + Layout
No designer? → Canva templates look like 1000 other brands
solutionSteps: AI creates prompts for each slide
AI Chatbot brainstorms based on brand

brandVoice.problemSubtitle: Website Reads Like an Intern Wrote It
realityChecks: Intern writes social → doesn't understand brand guidelines
CEO writes LinkedIn → too formal for brand
consequences: Brand identity unclear, hard to recognize

publishing.problemSubtitle: Same Post 3 Times — Everyone Blames Each Other
realityChecks: Team of 3: Who posts what? Already posted?

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 2 Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple process, impressive results. No training needed, no technical skills required.

step1.title: Enter Brand Guidelines
step1.description: Upload logo, colors, tone of voice. AI learns and remembers everything about your brand.

step2.title: Choose Topic & Channels
step2.description: Enter a topic, select channels to post. AI automatically adjusts format for each platform.

step3.title: AI Creates Content
step3.description: In seconds, you get posts, captions, hashtags suitable for each channel and brand voice.

step4.title: Review & Publish
step4.description: Preview, edit if needed, then post immediately or schedule. All from one dashboard.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Flowa. Can't find the answer? Contact our 24/7 support team.

items.question: Is Flowa suitable for my industry?
items.answer: Flowa supports 50+ different industries from E-commerce, F&B, Real Estate, Education, to Fintech and more. Our AI has been trained with industry-specific data to create professional and relevant content.

items.question: Can AI maintain my brand's tone of voice?
items.answer: Absolutely! Just enter your brand guidelines, tone of voice, and a few sample texts. AI will learn and maintain consistent voice across all content. You can also adjust and fine-tune anytime.

items.question: Can I publish directly to social channels?
items.answer: Yes, Flowa integrates with Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Zalo, and many other channels. You can schedule and publish automatically, or review before posting. All managed from one dashboard.

items.question: Is AI-generated content duplicate?
items.answer: No! Each content generated by AI is unique and customized according to your brand, context, and goals. We also have plagiarism checking tools to ensure originality.

items.question: Is there a limit to content I can create?
items.answer: Free Starter plan allows 100 content/month. Professional plan provides unlimited content generation, enough for all professional marketing team needs.

items.question: Do I need technical skills to use Flowa?
items.answer: Absolutely not! Flowa is designed for marketers, not developers. Intuitive interface, easy drag and drop. Setup takes only 2 minutes and you can start creating content immediately.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Security is top priority. We use SSL encryption, comply with GDPR, and never share your data with third parties. Data is stored on secure servers in Singapore.

items.question: Is Vietnamese supported?
items.answer: Flowa is specially optimized for Vietnamese with AI that understands culture, context, and expressions of Vietnamese people. Interface and support are 100% Vietnamese.
